query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A portrait-style image of a person with long dark hair, visible eyes, and a light-colored collared garment, presented with overlapping translucent layers that create multiple simultaneous views of the face and upper body against a background split between warm amber tones on the left and cool cyan tones on the right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, dreamlike portrait of a person with long dark hair, rendered through intentional motion blur and double exposure techniques that layer multiple translucent views of the face and upper body into a single disorienting composition. The image is split between aggressive warm amber and cool cyan color fields that clash without blending, while flat lighting eliminates dimensional depth. The surreal, abstract result dissolves the subject into flowing gestures of color and form, prioritizing subconscious atmosphere over recognizable representation.
